title: TrustedContractImportRequest
description: Typed trusted contract import request family for broker-mediated trust admission.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for trusted import requests.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this trusted import request.

kind.description: Trusted contract kind admitted by this request.

importer.description: Principal identity requesting trusted contract import.

reason.description: Operator rationale for admitting this trusted contract.

imported_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp describing when import approval occurred.

source.description: Stable source descriptor for the trusted contract material.
